# AyushThinks

> I always wanted to create content, not because I wanted to be read but because I wanted to force myself to create to force myself to 'think', I think of myself as a creative person and this is the platform now.

This is not going to be just about blogs, wait for art, programming and music related content.

## Find me at

- [Github](https://github.com/ayushsingh-ayushsingh)
- [Email](mailto:ayushpno@gmail.com)
